args.code:
import pandas as pd
contract_data = locals()['var_function-call-16849322870232773229']
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contract_data)
# Filter contracts for the last 5 months from 2022-11-25
df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'])
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-11-25') - pd.DateOffset(months=5)
eligible_contract_ids = df_contracts[df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'] >= start_date]['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip().tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(pd.io.json.dumps(eligible_contract_ids))

val_args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

contract_data = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-13724993819285815276'])
df_contracts = pd.DataFrame(contract_data)

# Filter contracts for the last 5 months from 2022-11-25
df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'])
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-11-25') - pd.DateOffset(months=5)
eligible_contract_ids = df_contracts[df_contracts['CompanySignedDate'] >= start_date]['Id'].str.replace('#', '').str.strip().tolist()

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(eligible_contract_ids))
